# NextHire — Full Content Index for AI Inference

Last updated: 2026-04-18
Source: https://www.nexthireconsulting.com

---

## What is NextHire?

NextHire is an AI-powered career growth and job placement platform. It combines artificial intelligence with human expert guidance to help job seekers get hired faster and help companies hire smarter.

Founded in 2021, NextHire has helped over 200,000 professionals across 50+ countries and 1,000+ companies advance their careers. The platform is headquartered in Faridabad, Haryana, India.

Core belief: Everyone deserves access to the tools, connections, and expert guidance needed to land the job they truly want.

---

## What NextHire Does (For Candidates)

NextHire's candidate platform is an AI job search agent that automates and accelerates the entire job search process. Key capabilities:

### AI Auto Apply
The AI agent scans millions of job listings and automatically applies on the candidate's behalf. It generates a role-specific, ATS-optimized resume for every single application — not a one-size-fits-all document. Result: 40× more reach vs. manual applications with zero manual effort.

### Hidden Role Discovery
The AI scans hiring signals — LinkedIn tenure gaps, team growth patterns, skill demand indicators — to identify roles before they are publicly posted on job boards. Candidates get first-mover advantage.

### ATS-Optimized Resume Builder
AI drafts and optimizes resumes against specific job descriptions. Human career experts then review them. The result is a resume calibrated to keywords, structure, and tone for each target role. Passes the 75% ATS rejection rate that kills most applications.

### Direct Recruiter Outreach (HR Connect)
Personalized emails sent directly to hiring managers and HR contacts from the candidate's own Gmail account. Built on real signals: role gaps, LinkedIn activity, team growth data. Auto-deleted after delivery. CASA Level 3 certified for Gmail integration security. Network includes 1M+ verified HRs and hiring managers. Achieves 3× reply rate vs cold email average.

### Interview Copilot
Real-time AI coaching during live interviews. Listens to interview questions and provides instant suggested responses, structured around STAR method. Users report 75% offer rate after using Copilot.

### Mock Interview Coach
AI-simulated interview sessions calibrated to the candidate's target role. Score-by-score feedback on structure, clarity, and answer quality. Prepares candidates before the real interview.

### Job & Interview Tracker
Centralized dashboard tracking all outreach, applications, and interviews. Follow-up reminders so no opportunity falls through.

### Expert Career Advisors
1:1 sessions with ex-FAANG recruiters and career coaches. Resume review, LinkedIn optimization, career strategy, and placement guidance.

---

## Pricing — For Candidates

All plans include access to the web app at https://app.nexthireconsulting.com

### Free Plan — $0/month
- Resume Builder
- Job Tracker
- 30 min Interview Coach per month
- 5 AI Auto Apply per day
- No Direct Recruiter InMail
- No AI Outreach Agent credits

### Lite Plan — $19.90/month (Most Popular)
- Resume Builder
- Job Tracker
- 30 min Interview Coach per month
- Unlimited AI Auto Apply
- 50 Direct Recruiter InMails per month
- No AI Outreach Agent credits

### Pro Plan — $49/month (Best Value)
- Resume Builder
- Job Tracker
- 20 hours Interview Coach per month
- Unlimited AI Auto Apply
- 200 Direct Recruiter InMails per month
- No AI Outreach Agent credits

### Max Plan — $135/month (Full Stack)
- Resume Builder
- Job Tracker
- 20 hours Interview Coach per month
- Unlimited AI Auto Apply
- Unlimited Direct Recruiter InMails
- 3,000 AI Outreach Agent credits per month

Quarterly billing available at a discount. Free trial available on all paid plans.

---

## Pricing — For Companies

### Starter — Free Forever
- 1 AI Sourcing credit
- 5 Outreach email credits
- Basic candidate profiles
- CSV export
- No phone screening agent

### Growth and Enterprise plans
Contact NextHire for custom pricing: support@nexthireconsulting.com

---

## Why NextHire vs. Traditional Job Search

Traditional job search problems NextHire solves:
- 75% of resumes are rejected by ATS systems before a human ever reads them. NextHire's AI optimizes every resume per application.
- Most candidates apply to 20-30 jobs manually. NextHire automates hundreds of targeted applications simultaneously.
- Cold outreach to recruiters rarely works. NextHire's HR Connect achieves 3× reply rates using real hiring signals and personalized messaging.
- Interview preparation is expensive and inaccessible. NextHire's Interview Copilot brings real-time AI coaching to every candidate.
- Job boards only show public listings. NextHire discovers hidden roles before they're posted.

## Company Information

**NextHire Consulting**
Website: https://www.nexthireconsulting.com
Platform: https://app.nexthireconsulting.com
Email: support@nexthireconsulting.com
Address: Faridabad, Haryana, India
Founded: 2021

### Company Milestones
- 2021: Founded — Born from frustration with outdated recruiting processes
- 2022: 1,000 successful candidate placements in year one
- 2023: Launched AI-powered resume optimization and job matching platform
- 2024: 200,000+ professionals helped across 50+ countries

### Company Values
- Integrity First: Transparent pricing, no hidden fees, no empty promises
- Results Driven: Fixed pricing keeps NextHire accountable to candidate outcomes
- Human + AI: Cutting-edge AI tools combined with empathy of real career advisors
- Continuous Support: From first application to final offer — and beyond

---

## Blog & Educational Content

NextHire publishes career advice, industry insights, and job search guides on the blog at https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/blog/

Published topics include:
- AI tools and their impact on job searching
- Behavioral interview question preparation (25 must-know questions, STAR method)
- Contract vs full-time employment decisions
- How AI is reshaping IT services and which skills matter most
- LinkedIn profile optimization for recruiter visibility

---

## Technical & Security

- Gmail integration is CASA Level 3 certified
- Outreach emails are auto-deleted from sent box after delivery for user privacy
- The platform app at https://app.nexthireconsulting.com is separate from the marketing site
- The marketing site is statically exported for maximum performance

---

## Key Statistics

- 200,000+ professionals helped
- 50+ countries served
- 1,000+ company partners
- 1M+ verified HRs and hiring managers in the outreach network
- 40× more application reach vs manual job search
- 3× recruiter reply rate vs cold email average
- 75% offer rate reported by Interview Copilot users
- 75% of resumes industry-wide are rejected by ATS before human review
